prompt: Create a polished desktop website hero visual for a premium pet profile platform. No text, no letters, no numbers, no readable logos, no watermark. Scene: clean white and soft blush-pink studio environment with a rounded pink pedestal and very subtle paw-print decorations. Foreground: a happy friendly cream tabby cat, corgi dog, and small rabbit, realistic commercial photography with slightly idealized cute expression. Add a modern smartphone mockup standing upright near the pets, showing a generic pet profile interface made only of simple pink UI shapes, avatar circle, icon circles, and a QR-like square pattern with no readable characters. Add a small circular pink paw verification stamp graphic with paw icon only and no letters. Leave the left 42 percent of the image clean and uncluttered for real website copy to be overlaid later. Premium, trustworthy, polished, mobile app ecosystem mood.
constraints: No text anywhere. No brand words. No letters. No numbers. No watermark. No malformed typography. Do not crop pets. Keep safe margins for web overlay.
